subcodes.first_line: O Pen! Make mention of him who hath turned unto the precincts of the Ancient One and set his face toward his Lord, the Mighty, the Chosen One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم ان اذکر من اقبل الی شطر القدم و توجه الی وجه ربه العزیز المختار
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prophecy and fulfillment, @call to action, @proclamation to Jews, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
